Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 75 injects a course_viewed log entry for the student at CURRENT_TIME (today). Task description states 'If there is a record of the student viewing the course today, create... CONFIRMED'. Since log is injected, expected verdict is CONFIRMED.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 80, export_result.sh line 7
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 81, export_result.sh line 8

privileged_info_summary: This task involves auditing student activity in a Moodle learning management system. A synthetic test environment is created with: (1) a student user 'jsmith' (full name 'Jane Smith') with username 'jsmith', (2) a course 'BIO101' with full name 'Introduction to Biology', (3) the student enrolled in the course, and (4) a programmatically injected log entry showing the student viewed the course at the current time (today). The expected verdict is 'CONFIRMED' because a course_viewed event is explicitly injected for this student in the BIO101 course during setup, before the task begins. The evidence must be exported to '/home/ga/Documents/audit_evidence.xlsx' and the verdict written to '/home/ga/Documents/verdict.txt'.
